summary.en-US: Experimental Firefox client for sending selected GitHub pull-request context to Oh My Pi.

description.en-US:
OMP Send Context is an experimental Firefox add-on under active development. It may not work correctly in every GitHub pull-request view or Firefox environment.

The add-on adds a keyboard shortcut and context-menu action for GitHub pull-request pages. Select code and press Ctrl+Alt+K on Linux or Windows, or Command+Alt+K on macOS. You can also right-click the selection and choose Send selection and link to OMP.

The add-on attempts to send selected text, GitHub page or permalink, and page title to a local Oh My Pi session through Firefox native messaging. If the optional Linux native-messaging host is unavailable, it falls back to copying the context packet to the clipboard.

This first release intentionally includes extensive opt-in debugging. The toolbar button enables debug logging, and the GitHub context menu can copy a bounded diagnostic log. Debug logs contain stage and error codes only; they do not contain selected text, URLs, titles, prompts, bridge state, or bearer tokens.

No telemetry or remote data service is used. The companion OMP plugin and Linux native-messaging host are separate installations.

developer_comments.en-US:
This add-on is an experimental first release under active development and may not work correctly in every GitHub or Firefox environment. It intentionally includes extensive opt-in debugging to make early failures diagnosable. Debug output is limited to bounded stage and error codes and does not contain selected text, URLs, titles, prompts, bridge state, or bearer tokens.

Source: https://github.com/klondikemarlen/omp-send-context
Build: npm install && npm run package:firefox
The Firefox package excludes firefox/native-host/**. The Linux native-messaging host is separate and is not bundled.
